exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 100.0])
q1, q3 = s.quantile(0.25), s.quantile(0.75)
iqr = q3 - q1
mask = (s < q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | (s > q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
print(s[mask].tolist())
concepts_used: Calidad, limpieza y contratos de datos

selfcheck.chosen_text: Provocar violación/cuarentena o fail del gate
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: D1-Explorer: Theory on quality gates says required fields with nulls must fail the gate or go to quarantine—not silent impute with 0.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Exacto = filas idénticas; conflicto = misma clave con atributos distintos
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: D1-Explorer: Theory distinguishes exact duplicate rows from key conflicts with different attributes—do not always drop_duplicates.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Auditar y disputar la forma canónica sin perder el valor original
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: D1-Explorer: Keeping region_raw when normalizing enables audit of the canonical form without losing the original value.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Puede marcar (o borrar) colas legítimas de negocio como si fueran error
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: D1-Explorer: IQR without domain bounds risks treating legitimate business tails as errors.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Publicar métricas y cuarentena aunque pass=False
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: D1-Explorer: A failing quality gate must still publish metrics and quarantine counts even when pass=False.
